---
title: "Diginsight"
about:
  template: marquee
  image: diginsight.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

Diginsight is a free opensource project.

## Project members

Filippo Mineo | Milan, Italy<br>
Dario Airoldi | Milan, Italy<br>
Alessandro Avila | Milan, Italy<br>

## Contributors

Carlo Bollini | Milan, Italy<br>
Chayashree Gholally | Bhangalore, India<br>
Alessandro Avila | Milan, Italy<br>
